description: Check commands — create, cash, cancel, and list XRPL Checks with XRP and IOU support

userStories.title: check create command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to issue a check from the CLI so a recipient can pull funds at their convenience.
acceptanceCriteria: Read CheckCreate docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/checkcreate.md before implementing
Create src/commands/check.ts and register it in src/commands/index.ts and src/index.ts

xrpl check create subcommand with: --to (required), --send-max (required, XRP decimal or value/CURRENCY/issuer IOU format), --expiration ISO8601 (optional, converted to XRPL epoch: Math.floor(new Date(s).getTime()/1000)-946684800), --destination-tag n (optional), --invoice-id string (optional, plain string auto hex-encoded via convertStringToHex; CLI rejects if input > 32 bytes)
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
On success, output prints the Check ID (from AffectedNodes CreatedNode where LedgerEntryType === 'Check')
Reuse parseAmount and toXrplAmount from src/utils/amount.ts for --send-max parsing
tests/e2e/check/check.validation.test.ts: missing --to, missing --send-max, invalid ISO date, missing key material (no network)
tests/e2e/check/check.create.test.ts: create XRP check, --expiration, --destination-tag, --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: check cash command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to cash a check from the CLI so I can pull funds authorised for me.
acceptanceCriteria: Read CheckCash docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/checkcash.md before implementing
xrpl check cash subcommand with: --check hex (required, 64-char Check ID), --amount (optional, XRP decimal or IOU), --deliver-min (optional, XRP decimal or IOU)
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
CLI exits with error if both --amount and --deliver-min are provided
CLI exits with error if neither --amount nor --deliver-min is provided
Reuse parseAmount and toXrplAmount from src/utils/amount.ts
tests/e2e/check/check.cash.test.ts: cash an XRP check with --amount, cash with --deliver-min, --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: check cancel command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to cancel a check from the CLI so the reserved funds are freed.
acceptanceCriteria: Read CheckCancel docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/checkcancel.md before implementing
xrpl check cancel subcommand with: --check hex (required, 64-char Check ID)
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
tests/e2e/check/check.cancel.test.ts: sender cancels own check, --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: check list query command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to list pending checks for an account so I know which IDs to cash or cancel.
acceptanceCriteria: xrpl check list <address> subcommand using account_objects RPC with type: 'check'
Default human-readable output per check: check ID, send-max (XRP decimal or value/CURRENCY/issuer), destination, expiration (ISO8601 or 'none'), invoice-id (hex or 'none')
XRPL epoch timestamps converted to ISO8601: new Date((epoch + 946684800) * 1000).toISOString()
--json outputs raw JSON array
--node supported
tests/e2e/check/check.list.test.ts: create a check then verify it appears in list output; --json output
Typecheck passes
